description: Filing a grievance. I was forced to stay two hours past my shift on the chassis line three nights running with no advance notice and no offer to lower-seniority members first. I want this on record before the next committee meeting.
subject: Grievance intake — overtime forced on second shift

description: My paycheck showed a higher health premium deduction this period and I don't understand the new tier. Can someone in benefits walk me through what changed?
subject: Question about healthcare premium change

description: My union dues line came out higher than the posted rate this month. Want to confirm the amount before I bring it up at the hall.
subject: Dues deduction looks wrong on my stub

description: A day-shift opening on my line went to someone junior to me. I had my bid in on time. I need a steward to pull the posting records and start a Step 1.
subject: Grievance — seniority bid bypassed on day-shift opening

description: The point-of-operation guard on press #4 has been off since maintenance worked on it Friday and the line is still running. I want this logged with the safety committee today.
subject: Safety report — guard missing on stamping press #4

description: Temperatures in the body shop have been brutal and the spot coolers aren't keeping up. Three of us felt lightheaded yesterday. Asking the safety committee to inspect.
subject: Safety report — heat stress in the body shop

description: First time dealing with this. Something happened on my line I think violates the contract. Can you point me to the form and tell me how long I have to file?
subject: How do I file a grievance?

description: Just got brought on in skilled trades and I want to sign up for the next new-member orientation at the hall. What dates do you have?
subject: New-member orientation — when is the next session?

description: I've been called into a disciplinary meeting Thursday over an attendance write-up I think is wrong. I need a steward there with me. Who can cover it?
subject: Disciplinary hearing — need steward representation

description: I need to add my newborn to my health coverage and I'm not sure which form and what the deadline is. Help appreciated.
subject: Benefits — adding a dependent to my coverage

description: There's an unguarded pinch point at weld cell 7 where parts feed in. Somebody is going to lose a finger. Please get the safety officer to look.
subject: Safety report — pinch-point complaint at weld cell 7

description: I was out on approved leave six weeks. I want to confirm how that affects my vacation accrual for the year before I schedule time off.
subject: Question — vacation accrual after my leave

description: Following up on my overtime grievance. The committee said it would move to Step 2. Do we have a hearing date yet? I'd like to know who's representing me.
subject: Grievance follow-up — Step 2 hearing date

description: I moved and changed my cell number. Please update my member record so I get the bulletins and shift notices.
subject: Update my contact info on file

description: I want to catch a steward in person about a write-up. What are the office hours at the hall this week?
subject: Steward office hours this week?

description: Pharmacy says one of my prescriptions isn't covered under the plan anymore. I need to know the appeal process through the benefits office.
subject: Benefits — prescription not covered, who do I call?

description: The eyewash station in the trades shop has a busted valve and hasn't worked in a week. We handle chemicals here. Needs to be fixed and logged.
subject: Safety report — eyewash station out of service

description: My supervisor denied my bereavement leave for my uncle's funeral saying he didn't qualify under the contract language. I read it differently. I want to grieve it.
subject: Grievance — denied bereavement leave

description: I've been pulling afternoon shift for a month and I'm not seeing the shift premium on my checks. Can someone confirm whether I should be getting it?
subject: Question — am I owed shift-premium pay?

description: Lost my wallet and my union membership card with it. How do I get a replacement issued at the hall?
subject: Replacement union card request
